citation: 12 USC §1717 + Blue Water Navy Vietnam Veterans Act of 2019 (eff. 2020-01-01)
comment: Hand-calc: $400,000 VA loan in Autauga AL (not high-cost). $400k <= $832,750 baseline → va_standard. VA full-entitlement uses FHFA conforming limits since 2020 (Blue Water Navy Vietnam Veterans Act removed VA-specific loan limits).
